args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' AND LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE '%street hype%' AND LOWER(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%maginnis%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

result.preview: "Amazon Music earned the most revenue in USD from Brucqe Maginnis' song 'Street Hype' across all countries."
